channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Imran Khan and Bushra Bibi Get Bail in Toshakhana Fake Receipt Case
item.description: In a significant ruling, an Islamabad court has granted bail to Imran Khan, the founder of Pakistan Tehreek-e-Insaf (PTI), and his wife Bushra Bibi in the case concerning a fake receipt allegedly used...

item.title: Canadian Defence Minister Comments on Iran’s Khamenei and Ottawa’s Position on Air Strikes
item.description: Defence Minister David McGuinty labelled Iran’s late Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei as 'a force for evil' while defending Canada’s endorsement of recent U.S. and Israeli air strikes on Iran. Th...

item.title: Sonia Gandhi Criticises Centre for Silence on Khamenei’s Death Amid Iran-Israel Tensions
item.description: Congress leader Sonia Gandhi has strongly criticised the Indian government over its silence following the death of Iran's Supreme Leader, Ayatollah Ali Khamenei. She said that the Centre's lack of com...

item.title: Winnipeg's Iranian Community Expresses Mixed Reactions to Military Strikes in Iran
item.description: Residents of Winnipeg’s Iranian community have expressed a wide range of reactions following recent military strikes in Iran. While some individuals see the strikes as a justified response to escalati...

item.title: Advonics Security Nigeria Becomes Strategic Partner in Commonwealth Network
item.description: Nigerian security and tech company, Advonics Security Nigeria Limited (ASNL), don get invitation to join Commonwealth-backed enterprises through strategic partnership with the Commonwealth Enterprise ...

item.title: Ricky Stuart fast-tracks Owen Pattie in NSW Cup to aid development
item.description: Canberra Raiders coach Ricky Stuart has opted to start promising young hooker Owen Pattie in the NSW Cup to accelerate his development, ahead of the NRL season opener against the Manly Sea Eagles. Pat...

item.title: AI Coding Startup Cursor Reaches $2 Billion Annualized Revenue
item.description: Cursor, an AI-powered coding assistant founded in 2022, has reportedly surpassed $2 billion in annualized revenue, according to a source cited by Bloomberg. The startup, which initially focused on ind...

item.title: Treasury Outlines Plan to Address Pending Bills and Fiscal Deficit
item.description: National Treasury Cabinet Secretary John Mbadi has briefed the National Assembly's Budget and Appropriations Committee on steps the government is taking to manage pending bills in Ministries, Departme...

item.title: Senate approves September date for first BARMM regular elections
item.description: MANILA, Philippines — The Philippine Senate has approved on third and final reading Senate Bill 1823, which reschedules the first regular elections in the Bangsamoro Autonomous Region in Muslim Mindan...

item.title: How to Safely Climb Mount Kilimanjaro and Manage Low Oxygen
item.description: Last October, Dr. Stephen Archer and his daughter Elizabeth started the nine-day Lemosho route at Mount Kilimanjaro, Tanzania, to achieve their lifelong dreams. Unlike Everest, Kilimanjaro is a hike, ...

item.title: US-Israel-Iran Conflict Escalates with Widespread Strikes and Tensions Rising
item.description: The war between the US, Israel, and Iran continues to intensify, with major developments reported across the Middle East. US President Donald Trump has warned that the conflict could drag on for month...

item.title: Jordanian Businessman Arrested in the Philippines Over Bondi Beach Attack Link
item.description: Authorities in the Philippines arrested a 65-year-old Jordanian national, Mohammad Saleh Odeh, in Pagadian City, Zamboanga del Sur for immigration violations. Odeh is reportedly linked to two suspects...

item.title: Lily Allen's West End Girl Live tour delivers mixed performance with delayed stage entrance
item.description: Lily Allen's 'West End Girl Live' tour premiered at Glasgow Royal Concert Hall, marking her much-anticipated return. The show is structured in two acts, but fans had to wait 45 minutes before Allen ap...

item.title: US Report Highlights Pakistan’s Military Performance in May Conflict with India
item.description: Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif highlighted that a recent report submitted to the United States Congress formally validates Pakistan’s military capabilities, especially during the four-day conflict with...

item.title: Kesha condemns White House for using her song in military TikTok video
item.description: Singer Kesha has publicly criticised the Trump administration for using her 2011 hit ‘Blow’ in a TikTok video posted by the White House that highlighted the “lethality” of the United States armed forc...

item.title: Elijah Blue Allman faces multiple arrests in New Hampshire over burglary and assault incidents
item.description: Elijah Blue Allman, 49, the son of singer Cher and the late musician Gregg Allman, was arrested twice within the same weekend in New Hampshire. On Sunday, authorities responded to a report of a break-...

item.title: Calgary man faces sentencing for severe child abuse of eight-year-old stepson
item.description: In Calgary, a disturbing case of child abuse unfolded in court as Justice Ken McLeod considers a suitable sentence for 41-year-old Matthew Jason Scott. Scott pleaded guilty last spring to aggravated a...

item.title: ECP requests army deployment in Haripur after CM Afridi’s controversial remarks on by-polls
item.description: Khyber Pakhtunkhwa (KP) Chief Minister Sohail Afridi recently clarified his remarks regarding the upcoming NA-18 by-election, after the Election Commission of Pakistan (ECP) called for the deployment ...

item.title: Three Health Department officials charged over irregular R1m tender to new company
item.description: A company named Ithani Amen, registered only eight days before receiving a R1 million tender from the National Department of Health, is at the centre of a procurement scandal. The firm, which did not ...

item.title: Central Government Officials Hold 1-Hour ‘Seva Sankalp’ Pledge and Discussion
item.description: On Monday, 2nd March 2026, all central government officials across departments set aside an hour to read and discuss the three-page Seva Sankalp Resolution adopted by the Union Cabinet. The pledge, he...
